# JSON-Table

> Turn any JSON into a navigable tree and a sortable, filterable spreadsheet. Local-first, fast, free.

JSON-Table is a browser-based developer utility with a two-pane workspace: a tree navigator (with optional source view) on the left and a nested or flat virtualized grid on the right. Files never leave the browser.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Minimal landing page with paste-to-open entry point and product preview.
- [Workspace](/workspace): Interactive JSON viewer with tree navigation, per-column filters, column reordering, inline cell editing, flat virtualized grid mode, and global search (⌘F).
